title: Interview Skills: Introducing Yourself as a Developer

questions.sentence: In a job interview, the first question is often 'Tell us about yourself'.
This is an opportunity to highlight your skills and projects.
You should start with a brief summary of your background.
Mention a project you are proud of and the problems you solved.
Keeping your answer positive and professional shows that you are ready for a professional role.
Practice your introduction multiple times to feel more confident.
